params.name: apiKey
params.description: API key from the Parcels dashboard.

items.docs: Returns the current subscription plan, monthly unique shipment limit, usage counter, and the UTC date the counter resets.

Creates an asynchronous tracking request. The response usually contains a temporary uuid to poll with; if every requested shipment is already cached the response is complete immediately (done true, fromCache true) with no uuid. Carriers are auto-detected across 1,540 postal, courier, and freight carriers.

Creates a tracking request that delivers results by webhook instead of polling. Parcels POSTs JSON WebhookPayload events (shipment_completed per shipment, then batch_completed) to the HTTPS webhookUrl; failed deliveries may be retried.

params.name: uuid
params.description: Temporary tracking request UUID returned by create tracking request. Do not pass a tracking number here.

params.name: apiKey
params.description: API key from the Parcels dashboard.

items.docs: Polls a tracking request by UUID. Keep polling every few seconds until done is true; completed shipments include status, origin/destination, detected carrier, and the full timeline of tracking events.
